# Markdown Notebook Docs

This is primarily a reference-and-template skill.

Use it manually when you need:
- README structure
- notebook narrative sections
- data dictionary formatting
- operational documentation patterns

Prefer this as a human-invoked documentation aid, not an automatic capability skill.
